next_steps: Immediate cessation of epoprostenol due to clinical evidence of pulmonary veno-occlusive disease
Expedited transfer to a center of excellence for lung transplantation assessment
Optimization of right ventricular function with cautious inotropic support (e.g., milrinone)
Avoidance of aggressive fluid loading or further pulmonary vasodilators
Evaluation for biopsy or surgical diagnostic procedures only if clinically stabilized to confirm diagnosis
